name: log_risk
description: Log, update, list, and close BA project risks. Risk score is automatically computed from likelihood × impact using a 3×3 matrix (critical / high / medium / low). Use 'add' to record a new risk with mitigation and contingency plans, 'update' to revise any field (score is recomputed), 'list' to review open and mitigated risks (with open_count and critical_count summary), 'close' to mark a risk resolved.

user_id.description: User ID from session context. Always required.

project.description: Project name this risk belongs to. Used as filter in 'list'.

risk_id.description: UUID of the risk. Required for 'update' and 'close'.

likelihood.description: Likelihood of the risk occurring. Default: 'medium'.

impact.description: Business impact if the risk materialises. Default: 'medium'.

mitigation.description: Actions to reduce likelihood or impact.

contingency.description: Response plan if the risk materialises despite mitigation.

owner.description: Person or role responsible for managing this risk.

filter_status.description: For 'list': filter by status. 'active' = open + mitigated (default).

open_count.description: Number of open risks in the result set.

critical_count.description: Number of critical-scored risks in the result set.
